All Classes All Packages

C

city - Variable in class model.Event
City in which event occurred
clear() - Method in class dataaccess.Dao
Drops all tables
clearDatabase() - Method in class service.ClearService
Clears the data base
ClearRequest - Class in request
Deletes all the data from the database, including user accounts, auth tokens, and generated person and event data
ClearRequest() - Constructor for class request.ClearRequest
 
ClearResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
ClearResult() - Constructor for class result.ClearResult
 
ClearService - Class in service
Handles the clear functionality
ClearService() - Constructor for class service.ClearService
 
country - Variable in class model.Event
Country in which event occurred
